'''âd-p-dh-n''' ('''kadapdhenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chattelise|chattelise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-dh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chattelise|chattelise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-p-dh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kadapdhenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidapdhenoko|thidapdhenoko]] || [[word:jidapdhenoko|jidapdhenoko]] || [[word:shidapdhenoko|shidapdhenoko]] || [[word:kidapdhenoko|kidapdhenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudapdhenoko|thuthudapdhenoko]] || [[word:jujudapdhenoko|jujudapdhenoko]] || [[word:shushudapdhenoko|shushudapdhenoko]] || [[word:kukudapdhenoko|kukudapdhenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodapdhenoko|thodapdhenoko]] || [[word:jodapdhenoko|jodapdhenoko]] || [[word:shodapdhenoko|shodapdhenoko]] || [[word:kodapdhenoko|kodapdhenoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadapdhenoko|thadapdhenoko]] || [[word:jadapdhenoko|jadapdhenoko]] || [[word:shadapdhenoko|shadapdhenoko]] || [[word:kadapdhenoko|kadapdhenoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadapdhenithi|shadapdhenithi]] || [[word:shadapdheniji|shadapdheniji]] || [[word:shadapdhenishi|shadapdhenishi]] || [[word:shadapdheniki|shadapdheniki]]
